title: BSNC Mourns the Passing of Former Board Director Percy Nayokpuk
summary: BSNC mourns the unexpected passing of former BSNC Board Director Percy Nayokpuk. Percy was elected to the BSNC Board in 1985, and served for thirty years on the Board. Percy was an active and dedicated community member who valued and practiced our subsistence way of life. He also spent many years ma...
